title: Ignite HUD
description: An RPG style HUD for Minecraft!
body:
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/273725/description_40524017-352f-4126-bfab-80569c9b4b5d.png)

Oh, hello there! Welcome to the Ignite HUD's Curse Forge page! If you don't know what Ignite HUD is, well, it is quite obvious... It's a RPG style HUD for Minecraft. Embark on your new world with a very appealing (and soon highly customizable) HUD, with plenty of features and even more to come!

  ## Features **Player Widget** so you know you? * Player Skin * Player Experience bar and level * Player name * Player health bar * Player Food and Saturation * Player Armor and Toughness * Hardcode icon (when in hardcore mode) **Mount Stats** to take care of your pet: * Mount name * Mount health bar * Mount jump bar (when mount can jump, like Horses) **Clock Widget** for time management: * Day * Time * Icon with either Sun or Moon (moon shows when player can sleep) **Boss Bar** with name and colors **Player Breath Bar** with a cute bubble **Potion Effects** with effect duration, strength and even colour **Equipped Items** so you know the health of your gear: * Durability display (for items with durability, like swords) * Amount size (for items that are stackable)   ## Usage **ATTENTION**, this mod is client side only. Don't use it on a server!   ## Known Bugs * Apple skin overlay is still shown, and on top the items overlay. If you want to report a bug, use the issues tab please! I appreciate your help!   ## FAQs **_1\. Can I use this mod in my modpack?_** Why shouldn't you? Of course you can! As long as you give me credits for my very hard work. \*cof\*cof\* **_2\. Can you add support for \*modname\*?_** Nothing better than to ask me. I will take any requests! _**3\. Why my suggestion for mod \*modname\* didn't get accepted?**_ Well, if it wasn't accepted it was probably because the mod is not within an RPG game standard or it was because the mod is very low in popularity. _**4\. I'm not sure if the mod \*modname\* can be selected. What do I do?**_ Well, if you are not sure, you can send it to me (comment of private message) and I will check it for you! _**5\. The mod \*modname\* isn't that popular, but I think it's a very good adition to the game!**_ All the mods that can make my HUD better, I will take it! :)
